title: Physical Keyboard and Numpad Entry
notes: Shot Diagram and Drill Log Settings now include a saved Entry Method toggle: Touch Keypad or Physical Keyboard.
Physical Keyboard mode accepts the laptop number row and numpad directly in hole-entry fields without opening the MITHRIL touch keypad.
Tab moves through the normal field sequence, Shift+Tab moves backward, Enter saves and opens the next hole, and Ctrl+Enter saves and closes the current hole.
The hole editor shows a compact mode indicator with the available keyboard shortcuts.
Opening a hole in Physical Keyboard mode focuses and selects Overburden so typing can begin immediately.
The Entry Method setting is stored on the current device, allowing a laptop to stay in Physical Keyboard mode while an iPad remains in Touch Keypad mode.
All m39.5 pattern, dual shot-volume, PDF navigation, load calculations, selection, transfer, GPS, condition, Quick Fill, theme, backup, and offline behavior remains included.
